contextuallyTypedFunctionOptionalAndRest.tlua(1,32): error TLUA7006: Parameter 'a' implicitly has an 'any' type.
contextuallyTypedFunctionOptionalAndRest.tlua(1,39): error TLUA100034: A vararg parameter cannot have a name.


==== contextuallyTypedFunctionOptionalAndRest.tlua (2 errors) ====
    local f: () => void = function(a?, ...b) end;
                                   ~~
!!! error TLUA7006: Parameter 'a' implicitly has an 'any' type.
                                          ~
!!! error TLUA100034: A vararg parameter cannot have a name.
